text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I didn't think the cafe's new drinkwas gonna be this bitter...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: That aroma... Ah, yes... That's an<n>espresso.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...You can add two to three spoons of<n>sugar to it
to make it taste milder.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Wha? B-but... wouldn't add'n sugar<n>make me look
like a big dweeb?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Coffee is an indulgence. It's meant to<n>be drunk
in whatever way you want.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: The way I want? Well, in that case...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I wanna try and drink it bitter! 'Cause<n>that's what
a city girl would do!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...In Italy, where espresso comes from,<n>adding
sugar is called drinking it "city<n>style"...
apparently.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Really?! "City style", you say?! Um, well,<n>in that
case...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: I'll just add... a lil' sugar.
